questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. P. Nevertheless, it was India’s National Security Adviser (NSA) Ajit Doval’s trip to Russia in early September for the BRICS (Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa) NSA meeting, which included a high-profile personal meeting with Russian President Vladimir Putin, that needs greater analysis Q. Delaware, U.S. on September 21, 2024 has raised further hopes of consolidating security cooperation among the “four leading maritime democracies in the Indo-Pacific” R. Prime Minister’s Narendra Modi’s participation in the sixth Quad Leaders’ Summit in Wilmington, S. Mr. Doval also held one-on-one parleys with the Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, which was equally significant since India is leaving no stone unturned to resolve the four-year-old military standoff with China at the Line of Actual Control (LAC)
questions.explanation: D)RQPS R यह sentence बताता है कि "Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s participation in the sixth Quad Leaders’ Summit in Wilmington," क्यों महत्वपूर्ण है और इवेंट की शुरुआत करता है। इससे paragraph का main idea introduce होता है। Q, R के बाद logically fit होता है क्योंकि यह आगे explain करता है कि "Delaware, U.S. on September 21, 2024 has raised further hopes of consolidating security cooperation among the 'four leading maritime democracies in the Indo-Pacific'." इससे paragraph की continuity बनी रहती है और इस summit का geopolitical महत्व समझ में आता है। P, Q के बाद naturally आता है क्योंकि यह बताता है कि "Nevertheless, it was India’s National Security Adviser (NSA) Ajit Doval’s trip to Russia in early September for the BRICS NSA meeting," जो कि Quad summit के संदर्भ में एक और प्रमुख घटना है। इससे यह स्पष्ट होता है कि India अपने geopolitical कूटनीति को कैसे balance कर रहा है। S sentence paragraph को conclude करता है। यह justify करता है कि "Mr. Doval also held one-on-one parleys with the Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi," जिससे यह साबित होता है कि India-China के बीच चार साल से चल रहे military standoff को सुलझाने के प्रयास भी जारी हैं।Explanation in English: The paragraph starts with (R) "Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s participation in the sixth Quad Leaders’ Summit in Wilmington," as it introduces the main event, which is the Prime Minister's participation in the Quad Leaders' Summit. (Q) follows as it adds more details about the event, mentioning the location, date, and implications, "Delaware, U.S. on September 21, 2024 has raised further hopes of consolidating security cooperation among the 'four leading maritime democracies in the Indo-Pacific'." (P) comes next as it shifts the focus to another significant diplomatic engagement, "Nevertheless, it was India’s National Security Adviser (NSA) Ajit Doval’s trip to Russia in early September for the BRICS NSA meeting," which is contrasted with the earlier Quad meeting. (S) concludes the paragraph by adding another crucial point, "Mr. Doval also held one-on-one parleys with the Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi," indicating the ongoing diplomatic efforts with China.

questions.explanation: D) Adversity(noun) – Hardship, Misfortune, Difficulty, Trouble, Crisis विपत्ति Synonym:Hardship(noun) – Misfortune, difficulty, trouble, crisis (विपत्ति) Subjugate(verb) – To bring under domination or control, especially by conquest. कब्जा करना Pragmatic(adjective) – Dealing with things sensibly and realistically in a way that is based on practical rather than theoretical considerations व्यावहारिक Sagacious(adjective) – Having or showing keen mental discernment and good judgment; shrewd चतुर

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. The workers were instructed to dismantle the old machinery carefully to avoid any damage.
questions.explanation: B) Dismantle(verb) – Disassemble, Demolish, Deconstruct, Break down, Strip विखंडित करना Synonym:Disassemble(verb) – Demolish, deconstruct, break down, strip (विखंडित करना) Sanguine(adjective) – Optimistic or positive, especially in a seemingly bad or difficult situation. आशावादी Conjecture(noun) – An opinion or conclusion formed on the basis of incomplete information, speculation, guess. अनुमान Circumscribe(verb) – Restrict within limits, confine, limit. सीमित करना

questions.explanation: B) To smell a rat – The detective suspected Shyam because of his odd behaviour while investing in the scam. संदेह करना कि कुछ गलत है• A dog in the manger – one who prevents others from enjoying something despite having no use for it वह जो दूसरों को किसी चीज का उपयोग न होने के बावजूद उसका आनंद लेने से रोकता है• To bite the dust – to die, fail, or be defeated. असफल होना• To hang fire – to delay making a decision: निर्णय लेने में देरी करना

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. India wants more stringent (A) / data storage rules so it can (B) / good access data and conduct (C) / investigations when the need arises. (D)
questions.explanation: C)'good access data'के बदले'easily access data'या'access data efficiently'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँgrammatical errorहै।"Good access data"असंगत है, जबकि"easily access data"या"access data efficiently"सही अर्थ देता है; जैसे—The new software allows researchers to easily access data for analysis. •'easily access data'or'access data efficiently'will be used instead of'good access data'because there is agrammatical error."Good access data"is incorrect, while"easily access data"or"access data efficiently"conveys the intended meaning; Like—The new software allows researchers to easily access data for analysis.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. The trade disputes have lead to (A) / higher tariffs by the two countries (B) / and created unease over (C) / the depth of their security alliance. (D)
questions.explanation: D)'lead'के बदले'led'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँverb tense errorहै। Present perfect tense में "have" के साथ past participle (led) का प्रयोग होता है, न कि base form (lead) का; जैसे—The investigation has led to new discoveries. •'led'will be used instead of'lead'because there is averb tense error. With "have" (present perfect), the past participle"led"is required, not the base form"lead"; Like—The investigation has led to new discoveries.

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Select the option that gives their correct logical sequence. A. We were returning after an exhilarating day trip to a stunning valley when an experience of a different kind hit us. B. On our recent visit to a Himalayan hill State, we got stranded outside our property for a few hours. C. A huge fallen deodar tree was blocking the path leading to the resort. The local villagers, in a commendable display of solidarity and strength, cleared the path within a few hours. D. It made us realise the hardship and unpredictability of life in mountain terrain. E. But our biggest takeaway here was the spirit of brotherhood that bound these simple hill folks into a symbiotic community.
questions.explanation: D) BACDE B starts the paragraph as it introduces the context of the story: a recent visit to a Himalayan hill state where the travelers got stranded outside their property for a few hours. A logically follows B as it continues the story by describing how the travelers were returning from a day trip when they encountered a different experience, setting the stage for what happened next. C comes after A as it explains the specific challenge they faced, which was a fallen deodar tree blocking the path. It also highlights the response of the local villagers in clearing the path, adding to the story. D follows C as it reflects on the experience, making the travelers realize the hardship and unpredictability of life in the mountains. This sentence ties in with the challenge described in C and adds depth to the narrative. E concludes the paragraph by highlighting the “biggest takeaway” from the experience: the spirit of brotherhood and solidarity among the local villagers. This provides a reflective and positive ending to the story.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. He knew everyone on the island. Whenever his car stopped, half a dozen voices ____ 1 _____ shout out his name. Policemen, agricultural labourers of low social status and priests waved and smiled ____ 2 ____ he passed; everyone greeted him as a brother. They respected his honesty, and belligerence, and above all, they adored his typically Greek scorn and fearlessness when dealing with any _____ 3 ____ of Governmental red tape. On arrival, two of our cases containing linen and other things had been ______ 4 ____ by the Customs on the curious ground that they were merchandise. So, when we moved out to the villa and the problem of bed linen arose, Mother told Spiro ______ 5 _____ our cases in the Customs and asked for his advice. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1.
questions.explanation: B) ‘Would'का use होगा क्योंकि 'would' का अर्थ है अतीत में आदत या बार-बार की जाने वाली क्रिया। sentence में mention है कि जब भी उनकी कार रुकती थी, लोग अक्सर उनका नाम पुकारते थे। यह एक आदत को दर्शाता है, और 'would' इस संदर्भ में सबसे उपयुक्त है। उदाहरण: Whenever he came to the village, children would run to greet him. Could' का अर्थ हैसंभवतायाक्षमता, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है क्योंकि यह अतीत की आदत का उल्लेख नहीं करता Should' का अर्थ हैकर्तव्ययासुझाव, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है क्योंकि वाक्य किसी सलाह या आवश्यकता के बारे में नहीं है। Can' का उपयोगवर्तमानक्षमतायाअनुमतिके लिए होता है, जो यहाँ गलत है क्योंकि यह क्रिया अतीत में होती थी। 'Would'will be used because it indicates a habitual or repeated action in the past. The sentence describes how people regularly shouted his name whenever his car stopped, which makes "would" the most appropriate choice to convey this repeated past behavior. Example: Whenever he visited the market, the shopkeepers would greet him warmly. Could" meanspossibility or ability, which doesn’t fit here as the sentence describes a habitual past action, not a possibility. "Should" impliesobligation or recommendation, which is out of context since the sentence does not suggest any duty or advice. "Can" expressespresent ability or permission, which is incorrect because the sentence refers to apast habitual action, not a present situation.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. He knew everyone on the island. Whenever his car stopped, half a dozen voices ____ 1 _____ shout out his name. Policemen, agricultural labourers of low social status and priests waved and smiled ____ 2 ____ he passed; everyone greeted him as a brother. They respected his honesty, and belligerence, and above all, they adored his typically Greek scorn and fearlessness when dealing with any _____ 3 ____ of Governmental red tape. On arrival, two of our cases containing linen and other things had been ______ 4 ____ by the Customs on the curious ground that they were merchandise. So, when we moved out to the villa and the problem of bed linen arose, Mother told Spiro ______ 5 _____ our cases in the Customs and asked for his advice. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: B)As'का use होगा क्योंकि "as" का अर्थ होता है "जब" या "जैसे ही।" sentence में mention है कि लोग उनके पास से गुजरने के दौरान wave और smile करते हैं, इसलिए 'as' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'so' का अर्थ है "इसलिए" जो परिणाम दर्शाने के लिए उपयोग होता है और यहाँ कोई परिणाम नहीं है। 'Nor' का अर्थ है "न ही," जो नकारात्मक वाक्य के लिए उपयोग होता है, और 'Thus' का अर्थ है "इस प्रकार," जो कारण और परिणाम के लिए उपयोग होता है। ये सभी context के अनुसार सही नहीं हैं। 'As'will be used because it means "when" or "while." The sentence mentions that people waved and smiled as he passed by, making 'as' appropriate. Whereas, 'so' means "therefore," which is used to show consequence, 'nor' means "neither," used for negative contexts, and 'thus' means "therefore," which indicates a conclusion. These options don’t fit the context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. He knew everyone on the island. Whenever his car stopped, half a dozen voices ____ 1 _____ shout out his name. Policemen, agricultural labourers of low social status and priests waved and smiled ____ 2 ____ he passed; everyone greeted him as a brother. They respected his honesty, and belligerence, and above all, they adored his typically Greek scorn and fearlessness when dealing with any _____ 3 ____ of Governmental red tape. On arrival, two of our cases containing linen and other things had been ______ 4 ____ by the Customs on the curious ground that they were merchandise. So, when we moved out to the villa and the problem of bed linen arose, Mother told Spiro ______ 5 _____ our cases in the Customs and asked for his advice. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: D) 'Form'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँ पूरे संदर्भ में सरकारी कार्यप्रणाली में होने वाली जटिलताओं और बाधाओं की चर्चा हो रही है। "dealing with any _____ 3 ____ of Governmental red tape" में "form" शब्द सरकारी प्रक्रियाओं और दस्तावेज़ीकरण की परतों को संदर्भित करता है, जिसे आमतौर पर 'red tape' के रूप में जाना जाता है। अन्य विकल्प इस संदर्भ में सार्थक नहीं होते।• 'Form' should be used because in the entire context, the passage discusses the complexities and obstacles in governmental procedures. In "dealing with any _____ 3 ____ of Governmental red tape," the word 'form' refers to the layers of government processes and documentation, commonly known as 'red tape'. The other options do not make sense in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. He knew everyone on the island. Whenever his car stopped, half a dozen voices ____ 1 _____ shout out his name. Policemen, agricultural labourers of low social status and priests waved and smiled ____ 2 ____ he passed; everyone greeted him as a brother. They respected his honesty, and belligerence, and above all, they adored his typically Greek scorn and fearlessness when dealing with any _____ 3 ____ of Governmental red tape. On arrival, two of our cases containing linen and other things had been ______ 4 ____ by the Customs on the curious ground that they were merchandise. So, when we moved out to the villa and the problem of bed linen arose, Mother told Spiro ______ 5 _____ our cases in the Customs and asked for his advice. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4.
questions.explanation: A)Confiscated'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है किसी वस्तु को अधिकारपूर्वक जब्त करना। sentence में mention है कि कस्टम अधिकारियों ने लिनन और अन्य वस्तुओं वाले मामलों को जब्त कर लिया था, यह दावा करते हुए कि वे व्यापारिक सामान हैं। इसलिए, 'confiscated' यहाँ सही उत्तर है। जबकि 'collected' का अर्थ है इकट्ठा करना, 'concealed' का अर्थ है छिपाना, और 'contributed' का अर्थ है योगदान देना, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं। 'Confiscated'will be used because it means to seize something officially, often by authority. The sentence explains that the Customs had seized the cases containing linen and other items, claiming them to be merchandise. Thus, 'confiscated' fits the context. In contrast, 'collected' means gathered, 'concealed' means hidden, and 'contributed' means to give or donate, none of which align with the context of the sentence.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. He knew everyone on the island. Whenever his car stopped, half a dozen voices ____ 1 _____ shout out his name. Policemen, agricultural labourers of low social status and priests waved and smiled ____ 2 ____ he passed; everyone greeted him as a brother. They respected his honesty, and belligerence, and above all, they adored his typically Greek scorn and fearlessness when dealing with any _____ 3 ____ of Governmental red tape. On arrival, two of our cases containing linen and other things had been ______ 4 ____ by the Customs on the curious ground that they were merchandise. So, when we moved out to the villa and the problem of bed linen arose, Mother told Spiro ______ 5 _____ our cases in the Customs and asked for his advice. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5.
questions.explanation: A)About" का use होगा क्योंकि "about" का अर्थ होता है किसी विषय या चिंता को व्यक्त करना। sentence में mention है कि माँ ने स्पाइरो को कस्टम में फंसे मामलों के बारे में जानकारी दी, इसलिए 'about' यहाँ सही है। जबकि: "From" का अर्थ है स्रोत या उत्पत्ति, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है। "Within" का अर्थ है किसी चीज के अंदर, जो यहाँ विषय के बारे में बताने के लिए उपयुक्त नहीं है। "Behind" स्थिति या कारण को व्यक्त करता है, जो इस संदर्भ में फिट नहीं होता। "About" will be used because it means to express a topic or concern. The sentence explains that Mother informed Spiro about the cases stuck in Customs, making "about" appropriate here. Whereas: "From" implies source or origin, which is not suitable in this context. "Within" means inside something, which doesn’t fit the context of discussing the cases. "Behind" refers to position or cause, which is irrelevant here.
